title: AI Agents: Why Building Them Is Way Harder Than You Think! #shorts
summary: Building AI agents is harder than traditional software engineering because they require a data-driven, iterative approach and different skillsets. The video argues that AI agent development presents unique challenges distinct from conventional software development practices.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that building AI agents is harder than traditional software engineering. The reason is that agent development depends on a data-driven, iterative approach and calls for different skillsets than conventional software practices. The takeaway: AI agents pose unique challenges that set their development apart from standard software work.
